options.description: write column headings above the regular output
only print information about the current terminal
print active processes spawned by launchd(8) (unsupported)
'Quick mode': List only names and number of users currently logged on
list only the name, line and time fields (this is the default)
print a character after the user name indicating the state of the terminal line: '+' writable, '-' not writable, '?' bad
print the idle time for each user and the associated process ID

states.name: file
states.description: By default, who gathers information from the file /var/run/utmpx; an alternative file may be specified

subcommands.name: am
subcommands.description: returns the invoker's real user name
